seoTitle: Boyanup vs Boyerine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Boyanup and Boyerine. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boyanup and Boyerine.
heading: Boyanup vs Boyerine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boyanup, Western Australia and Boyerine, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boyerine has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Boyanup (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boyanup or Boyerine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boyanup has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Boyerine scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boyanup scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Boyerine scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boyanup or Boyerine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boyerine has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
